title: UI state persistence (.tick/.tui-state.json, gitignored)
description: Add load/save of UI state to a gitignored .tick/.tui-state.json (internal/tui/state.go): last active view, selected scope+tick, collapsed tree nodes, active filters/grouping. Load in the tui command before tea.NewProgram; save on quit. Add .tick/.tui-state.json to .gitignore (next to .index.json) so it never hits the merge driver (design section 9). Independent of the view ticks. Files: internal/tui/state.go (new) + test; cmd/tk/cmd/tui.go (load/save calls); .gitignore.
acceptance_criteria: unit: round-trip marshal/unmarshal; missing file yields defaults (no error); integration: launch, change view+selection, quit writes file in temp .tick, relaunch restores; path is gitignored
